landing.headline: Your landlord won't fix it?
landing.description: Photo the problem. Speak about it. A legal letter citing UK housing law is sent to your landlord in 60 seconds. Any language. Any tenant.
landing.step1_detail: AI identifies the issue and severity
landing.step3_detail: Citing s.11 LTA 1985, HHSRS, Homes Act 2018
landing.step4_detail: Auto-escalation to environmental health if ignored
landing.evidence_note: Your evidence is yours. Download anytime. Free forever.

dashboard.title: Your Cases
dashboard.empty_description: Report a housing problem and we'll generate a legal letter for your landlord in 60 seconds.

report.step_type_description: Select the type of defect in your property.
report.step_photos_description: Take up to {{max}} photos. GPS data is automatically removed for your privacy.
report.step_voice_description: Speak in any language. We'll transcribe and translate automatically.
report.step_voice_privacy: Voice recordings are deleted within 1 hour of processing. Never stored long-term.
report.step_review_description: Check the details below. Your legal letter will be generated and sent after payment.
report.step_review_landlord_note: Used only to send the letter. Never shared or marketed to.
report.step_review_what_next_detail: After payment, a legal letter citing s.11 Landlord and Tenant Act 1985, the Housing Health and Safety Rating System (HHSRS), and the Homes (Fitness for Human Habitation) Act 2018 will be sent to your landlord with your evidence attached. They have 14 days to respond. If they don't, we'll prepare an environmental health complaint for your local council.
report.step_review_disclaimer: This is not legal advice. RentShield generates correspondence based on UK housing law. For specific legal guidance, consult a solicitor or Citizens Advice.

case_detail.council_complaint_ready: Council complaint ready — review and submit

consent.title: Your Data, Your Control
consent.intro: RentShield needs your permission to process the following data to generate and send legal letters on your behalf.
consent.data_detail: We collect your email (encrypted) and landlord contact details solely to send legal correspondence. We never share your data with third parties. You can delete your account and all data at any time.
consent.voice_detail: Voice recordings are processed by Speechmatics (UK data residency) to create text transcriptions. Recordings are deleted within 1 hour of processing and are never stored long-term.
consent.photo_detail: Photos are analysed by AI to classify defects. GPS data is stripped before upload. Photos are retained for the duration of your case plus 90 days, and you can delete them at any time.
consent.accept: I agree — let me report my problem
consent.withdraw: You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account in Settings.

errors.data_safe: Your data is safe. This error has been reported automatically.
